title: Happy Mother's Day Balloons - 16 Inch Mother's Day Inflated Foil Balloons Rose Gold Foil Balloons - AMAZING MUM - Mother’s Day Banner, Ideal for Mother’s Day Party Decor and Surprise
features: MOTHERS DAY BALLOONS: Package include a 16 inch "AMAZING MUM" letter balloons set, Two 18 Inch pink Heart-Shaped balloon, a pieces of hanging ribbon for walls or ceilings.

HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS: Happy mothers day balloons is made of premium latex and aluminum foil, which is very durable, non-toxic and eco-friendly. Please kindly be assured to use our balloons which is of high standard quality.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE: This balloon set is very easy to assemble. No more frustration and confusion when it comes to your party decorations. Fill all the balloons in the balloon bag with air first using a straw, then you can hang or stick them anywhere you want to decorate. Decorate your party venue in about 10 minutes.

PERFECT PARTY DECORATION: Our mother's day balloons come with cute and fun prints, perfect for mothers day decorations party, mom's birthdays or family events. Excellent photo background or photo props to take photo shoots and selfies with family and friends. Enjoy it all on a good day, ideal party party choice.
WIDE USE: Stick Aluminum foil balloons on the wall or hang them with ribbon,It Can be used for Dessert table,wall, window, room, door, balcony, courtyard fence, ceiling, etc.
